creator: yasuf@big.or.jp
text:
Ruby 1.2.4 was released.  Here is an update patch.

diff -ruN rubytk-1.2.3.19990315/Makefile rubytk/Makefile
--- rubytk-1.2.3.19990315/Makefile	Thu Mar 25 15:59:34 1999
+++ rubytk/Makefile	Fri Apr  9 02:20:05 1999
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:    ja-rubytk
-# Version required:     1.2.3
+# Version required:     (depends on ${MASTERDIR})
 # Date created:         15 March 1999
 # Whom:                 Yasuhiro Fukuma <yasuf@big.or.jp>
 #
 # $Id$
 #
 
-PKGNAME=	ja-rubytk-1.2.3
+PKGNAME=	ja-rubytk-${VERSION}
 CATEGORIES=	japanese x11-toolkits
 
 MAINTAINER=	yasuf@big.or.jp
